11 Bromo Dorn

11 Bromo Dorn

  • Ht./Wt.:
    6-6 / 185
  • Class:
    Freshman
  • Hometown:
    Maui, Hawaii
  • Highschool:
    Seabury Hall HS
  • Major:
    Undeclared

  • Media

  • Career

Summary

Biography

Seabury Hall High School: Was named the Hawaii Gatorade Player of the Year, Hawaii MaxPreps Player of the Year and two-time First Team All State selection ... averaged 27.6 points per game, 6.2 rebounds per game and 3.4 assists per game ... helped the Spartans to a state championship.
No stats available for the current season.
